title: LangGraphTaskState
description: A1 — Serialised form of the LangGraph TaskState. Documents all fields that flow through the pipeline. Used for artifact validation and debugging.

task_id.description: Stable hash-based task ID from the existing manifest (e.g. task_28cdfabba7).

repo_name.description: Repository name used for artifact organisation.

target_file.description: Relative path to the primary file containing the smell.

smell.description: Full smell object as produced by detect_smells.py.

context.description: Full context object as produced by gather_context.py.

manifest_task.description: Full manifest task object as produced by build_manifest.py.

actionability.description: B1 classifier output. Null until the classifier node runs.

plan.description: B3 planner output. Null until the planner node runs.

edit_result.description: Raw result dict from the agent adapter. Null until the edit node runs.

changed_files.description: Relative paths of files actually modified by the edit node.

verification_result.description: Verification node output. Null until the verify node runs.

critique_result.description: Critique node output. Null until the critique node runs.

status.description: Current lifecycle position of the task.

skip_reason.description: Set when status is skipped. Explains why the task was not attempted.

error.description: Set when status is failed. Records the exception or error message.

retry_count.description: Number of edit-verify-critique cycles attempted so far.

artifact_paths.description: Maps node name to the absolute path of the artifact file written by that node.
